expectations.text: Includes an unprompted suggestion to update the documentation at the end of the response
expectations.evidence: 'Quer que eu atualize a documentação do projeto para refletir esse novo estado?'

expectations.text: Names specific documentation files that should be updated
expectations.evidence: Names 4 specific files: docs/homelab-context.md, optiplex-openclaw-report.md, homelab-implementation-report.html, homelab-network-docs.md

expectations.text: Asks if the user wants the docs updated rather than updating them automatically
expectations.evidence: 'Se quiser, é só confirmar e eu atualizo todos de uma vez' — waits for confirmation

notes: Baseline also produced a proactive suggestion naturally — this behavior appears to be inherent in the model for this type of context. Skill adds formatting consistency (📄 separator) but doesn't uniquely enable the proactive behavior.
